Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

Class AbstractObjectVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleObjectValidator<V,​T>,​T>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<S,​V,​T>
Type Parameters:
S - the type of verifier returned by the methods
V - the type of validator used by the verifier
T - the type of the value being verified
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,​T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractArrayVerifier, AbstractBooleanVerifier, AbstractComparableVerifier, ClassVerifierImpl, CollectionVerifierImpl, InetAddressVerifierImpl, ListVerifierImpl, MapVerifierImpl, ObjectVerifierImpl, OptionalVerifierImpl, PathVerifierImpl, StringVerifierImpl, UriVerifierImpl, UrlVerifierImpl
public abstract class AbstractObjectVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleObjectValidator<V,​T>,​T>
extends Object
implements ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,​T>
Default implementation of ExtensibleObjectVerifier.
